ItacAcademyItem.Name: Ringiovaniti (Accademia dei)
ItacAcademyItem.EmblemDescription: Fountain of Youth, her water flowing into a cistern, on the waters of which is an eagle shone on by ther rays of the sun
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: Maylender includes one publication related to this Academy: L`Aquila rinovata. Discorso per la conversione di San Agostino Protettore dell`Accademia dei Ringiovaniti (Bologna, Ferroni, 1648)
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
